name: Izzy 61.5" Floor Lamp - FLL4088 - Nickle - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Izzy floor lamp, standing at 61.5 inches tall. Crafted in nickel, this lamp brings a contemporary touch to any room. Its sleek iron construction is complemented by 60 acrylic components, creating a subtle blend of materials that enhance its modern appeal. The Izzy floor lamp features an E26 socket, making it compatible with a variety of bulbs to achieve your desired ambiance. The composition includes 80 percent iron and 20 percent acrylic, ensuring a robust and stylish structure. This lamp is the perfect addition for those looking to add a unique and practical piece to their home decor. Its design ensures it blends seamlessly into any setting, providing both function and style.
